verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From strength to strength we sometimes go Then again we're sinking low In the shadow of a mountain Looming high above our head

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We need not fear what lies ahead For the word has clearly said That our faith would be sufficient To make the mountain disappear

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Speak to the mountain You'll not triumph over me Be thou removed from here to yonder Disappear into the sea Speak to the mountain Speak with authority And the mountain must move And you shall claim victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the midst of the battle When the foe is gaining ground Just look up and see
